prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: On the left, five small file icons each export one or two items (shown as small colored balls). Streams of these balls flow rightward into a large barrel labeled "index.ts" in the center. The barrel has a funnel on top collecting all the exports. On the right, a consumer file imports from the barrel through a single clean spout, receiving all the items through one import statement. Without the barrel (shown as a faded "before" ghost image above), the consumer would need five separate import arrows. A "clean vs messy" comparison feel.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
